steps.title: Solve for the point
steps.content:
Simplify to find $x$, then use it to find $y$.
$$x+63x+84=20$$
$$64x=-64$$
$$x=-1$$
$$y=9(-1)+12$$
$$y=3$$

steps.title: Calculator shortcut
steps.content: Graphing the two equations and reading the intersection gives the same $y$-coordinate. The answer is 3.
